name: Mirbud S.A.
summary: Mirbud S.A. operates as a general contractor in the construction market in Poland. The company constructs industrial projects, such as production and logistics halls, and cold stores and freezers; and public utility buildings, including commune and customs offices, sports halls, gyms, stadiums, public administration offices, shopping malls, offices, hotel facilities, hospitals, didactic buildings, specialised research units, car showrooms and service stations, and schools. It is also involved road engineering construction consisting of roads with crossings, junctions, roundabouts, and accompanying infrastructure; streets, car parks, and sidewalks; railway sidings and tram lines; viaducts and bridges; and culverts. In addition, the company constructs single-family, terraced, and multi-family residential buildings. It also rents construction equipment, as well as engages in the production of mineral and bituminous masses. The company was founded in 2002 is based in Skierniewice, Poland.
